This dominance of two-phonon scattering invalidates the usual picture of energy diffusion due to frequent scattering by subthermal phonons; instead, energy relaxes via rare scattering events involving thermal phonons. Below the Bloch-Grüneisen temperature, the energy relaxation rate scales as the single-particle rate, namely as $T^3$ for soft phonons. For anisotropic electron bands, an intermediate regime appears between two Bloch-Grüneisen temperatures, in which both allowed single-phonon and two-phonon processes scale as $T^2$.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了当单声子散射被禁止而双声子散射允许时，相关电子系统中的能量弛豫机制，发现在Bloch-Grüneisen温度以上，双软横向光学声子的能量弛豫率超过单声子过程。
AI.motivation: 最近太赫兹光谱对量子顺电体SrTiO₃和高温超导铜氧化物的研究重新激发了人们对相关电子系统中能量弛豫的兴趣。当单声子散射因对称性或动量守恒被禁止时，需要研究双声子散射在能量弛豫中的作用。
AI.method: 通过求解玻尔兹曼方程，分析在单声子散射被禁止而双声子散射允许的情况下，电子与软横向光学声子相互作用的能量弛豫机制。考虑了各向同性和各向异性电子能带的不同温度区域。
AI.result: 在Bloch-Grüneisen温度以上，双软横向光学声子的能量弛豫率超过单声子过程：单声子散射按1/T缩放，而双声子散射与T呈线性关系。这推翻了亚热声子频繁散射导致能量扩散的传统图像，能量通过涉及热声子的稀有散射事件弛豫。在Bloch-Grüneisen温度以下，能量弛豫率按单粒子速率缩放，对于软声子为T³。对于各向异性电子能带，在两个Bloch-Grüneisen温度之间出现中间区域，其中允许的单声子和双声子过程都按T²缩放。
AI.conclusion: 当单声子散射被禁止时，双声子散射在能量弛豫中起主导作用，特别是在高温区域。这一发现改变了传统对能量弛豫机制的理解，对相关电子系统的热输运性质有重要影响。

title: Electronic-Entropy-Driven Crossover to Close-Packed Phases in Transition Metals under Strong Electronic Excitation
summary: Solid-solid phase transitions in metals are traditionally governed by changes in density or external pressure. Here, we show that electronic entropy alone can control structural stability and drive phase transitions at fixed density across transition metals. Using finite-temperature density functional theory, we construct pressure-temperature phase diagrams for 15 metals spanning hcp, fcc, and bcc-ground-state structures. Despite their diverse ground-state behavior, all systems exhibit a common high-temperature response: structural stability collapses toward a reduced manifold dominated by close-packed phases, with fcc emerging as the predominant structure, hcp persisting as a secondary phase, and bcc stability strongly suppressed. This identifies a robust entropy-driven crossover that progressively erases ground-state structural specificity under strong electronic excitation. To elucidate the microscopic origin of this behavior, we perform a detailed analysis of manganese, where spin-dependent calculations with a Hubbard U correction capture the interplay between magnetism, electronic localization, and lattice stability. At low temperatures, phase competition is governed by magnetic order and on-site Coulomb interactions, whereas increasing electronic temperature leads to demagnetization, phonon hardening, and the emergence of an entropy-dominated regime consistent with the universal trends. We show that electronic entropy generates a substantial hot-electron thermal pressure that modifies interatomic forces and drives structural rearrangements at fixed density, producing lattice-dynamical effects analogous to hydrostatic compression. These results establish electronic entropy as a fundamental thermodynamic control parameter for structural transformations in metals and provide a unified framework for understanding phase stability under extreme electronic excitation.

AI.tldr: 电子熵可在固定密度下驱动金属相变，高温时结构稳定性向密堆积相（fcc为主，hcp次之）收敛，bcc稳定性被抑制
AI.motivation: 传统金属固-固相变由密度变化或外部压力控制，本研究探索电子熵作为固定密度下结构稳定性和相变驱动因素的可能性
AI.method: 使用有限温度密度泛函理论构建15种金属的压力-温度相图，涵盖hcp、fcc和bcc基态结构；以锰为例进行详细分析，采用Hubbard U修正的自旋相关计算研究磁性、电子局域化和晶格稳定性之间的相互作用
AI.result: 所有系统在高温下表现出共同响应：结构稳定性向密堆积相主导的简化流形崩溃，fcc成为主要结构，hcp作为次要相持续存在，bcc稳定性被强烈抑制；电子熵产生显著热电子热压力，在固定密度下驱动结构重排
AI.conclusion: 电子熵是金属结构转变的基本热力学控制参数，为理解极端电子激发下的相稳定性提供了统一框架，揭示了熵驱动交叉效应逐渐消除基态结构特异性

title: Josephson diode effect in multichannel Rashba nanowires: role of inter-subband coupling
comment: 15 pages with 16 figures. Comments are welcome!
summary: The Josephson diode effect (JDE) has attracted considerable attention for its ability to enable directional, dissipationless supercurrents in quantum devices. While hybrid semiconductor-superconductor nanowire Josephson junctions provide a canonical platform, most theoretical treatments assume the single-channel limit of the nanowire; however, realistic devices are inherently multichannel due to transverse confinement. Here, we investigate the JDE in multichannel Rashba nanowire Josephson junctions, focusing on the role of inter-subband coupling. We show that subband hybridization qualitatively modifies both the topological phase diagram and the JDE response of the device. In contrast to the single-channel case, the topological phase is restricted to a finite window of Zeeman fields, within which Majorana bound states lead to a strong enhancement of the diode efficiency. Crucially, inter-subband coupling enables a finite JDE even when the Zeeman field is aligned purely along the spin-orbit direction-- a mechanism absent in independent-channel and strictly one-dimensional systems. Furthermore, multichannel coupling enhances spectral asymmetry and significantly increases the diode efficiency compared to single-channel junctions. These results identify multichannel hybridization as a key ingredient for realizing and optimizing nonreciprocal superconducting transport in experimentally relevant hybrid semiconductor nanowire Josephson junctions.

AI.tldr: 多通道Rashba纳米线约瑟夫森结中的约瑟夫森二极管效应研究，发现子带耦合显著增强二极管效率，并在拓扑相内产生强非互易超导输运。
AI.motivation: 约瑟夫森二极管效应（JDE）因其在量子器件中实现定向、无耗散超电流的能力而备受关注。虽然混合半导体-超导纳米线约瑟夫森结是典型平台，但大多数理论处理假设纳米线为单通道极限；然而实际器件由于横向限制本质上是多通道的。需要研究多通道系统中子带耦合对JDE的影响。
AI.method: 研究多通道Rashba纳米线约瑟夫森结中的约瑟夫森二极管效应，重点关注子带间耦合的作用。分析子带杂化如何改变拓扑相图和器件JDE响应，并与单通道情况进行对比。
AI.result: 1. 子带杂化显著改变拓扑相图，拓扑相被限制在有限的塞曼场窗口内；2. 在拓扑相内，马约拉纳束缚态导致二极管效率显著增强；3. 子带间耦合使得即使塞曼场完全沿自旋轨道方向时也能产生有限JDE，这在独立通道和严格一维系统中不存在；4. 多通道耦合增强谱不对称性，二极管效率相比单通道结显著提高。
AI.conclusion: 多通道杂化是实现和优化实验相关混合半导体纳米线约瑟夫森结中非互易超导输运的关键因素。这些结果为实验器件设计提供了重要指导，表明多通道特性可以增强约瑟夫森二极管效应。

title: Optical conductivity of topological semimetal Nb$_{2n+1}$Si$_n$Te$_{4n+2}$
summary: We study the linear optical conductivity of the Nb$_{2n+1}$Si$_n$Te$_{4n+2}$ family of layered van der Waals materials, which has recently gained considerable attention owing to its dimensionality-tunable electronic structure with a quasi-one-dimensional nodal-line state. At zero temperature, we analytically show that the Drude weight exhibits strong anisotropy: along the nodal-line direction it is finite at charge neutrality, whereas in the transverse direction it vanishes quadratically with Fermi energy. On the other hand, the interband optical conductivity exhibits the same linear frequency dependence along both the longitudinal and transverse directions, with only a direction-dependent slope in the low-frequency regime. We further analyze the leading finite-temperature corrections to the intraband and interband optical conductivities, showing that the zero-temperature results remain valid up to experimentally relevant temperatures.

AI.tldr: Nb2n+1SinTe4n+2层状范德华材料的线性光学电导率研究，发现其具有维度可调电子结构和准一维节线态，表现出强烈的各向异性Drude权重和方向依赖的光学响应。
AI.motivation: 研究Nb2n+1SinTe4n+2层状范德华材料家族，该材料因其维度可调的电子结构和准一维节线态而受到广泛关注，需要理解其光学电导率的各向异性特性。
AI.method: 通过解析方法研究零温度下的线性光学电导率，分析Drude权重的各向异性特征，并进一步分析有限温度对带内和带间光学电导率的主要修正。
AI.result: Drude权重表现出强各向异性：沿节线方向在电荷中性点处有限，而在横向方向随费米能级呈二次方消失。带间光学电导率在纵向和横向方向都表现出相同的线性频率依赖关系，仅在低频区域具有方向依赖的斜率。有限温度修正表明零温度结果在实验相关温度范围内仍然有效。
AI.conclusion: Nb2n+1SinTe4n+2材料的光学电导率表现出独特的各向异性特征，这些特征源于其准一维节线态电子结构，且这些特性在实验相关温度范围内保持稳定。

title: Stealthy hyperuniform disorder: A new route to controlling electric states and magnetic phase transition in correlated systems
summary: We investigate the effects of stealthy hyperuniform bond distributions on the electronic and magnetic properties of the Hubbard model on the honeycomb lattice. Hyperuniform structures, distinct from random and quasiperiodic ones, have recently attracted considerable interest due to their anomalous suppression of density fluctuations. By diagonalizing the noninteracting Hamiltonian, we show that a linear density of states (DOS) robustly emerges, while the stealth property of the bond distribution changes the wave functions in the higher-energy region extended and significantly modifies the DOS near the band edge. To clarify the impact on magnetism, we apply the real-space Hartree approximation to the Hubbard model. We find that, the phase transition always occurs between semimetallic and antiferromagnetically ordered states and its critical interaction strength is sensitive to the stealth property. A comparison with the quasiperiodic honeycomb tiling further highlights the role of structural correlations. These results demonstrate that stealthy hyperuniform disorder provides a novel route to controlling electronic states and magnetic phase transitions in correlated systems.

AI.tldr: 研究超均匀键分布对蜂窝晶格上哈伯德模型电子和磁性质的影响，发现这种特殊无序结构能产生线性态密度并调控磁相变临界点。
AI.motivation: 超均匀结构因其密度涨落的异常抑制而备受关注，但对其在强关联系统中电子和磁性质的影响尚不清楚。本研究旨在探索超均匀无序如何为调控关联系统的电子态和磁相变提供新途径。
AI.method: 通过对非相互作用哈密顿量对角化分析电子态密度和波函数特性，并应用实空间哈特里近似处理哈伯德模型来研究磁性质。与准周期蜂窝拼贴结构进行对比分析。
AI.result: 超均匀键分布能稳健地产生线性态密度，并显著改变高能区波函数和带边附近的态密度。磁相变始终发生在半金属态和反铁磁有序态之间，且临界相互作用强度对超均匀性质敏感。
AI.conclusion: 超均匀无序为调控关联系统的电子态和磁相变提供了新机制，其结构关联特性在决定系统性质中起关键作用，与准周期结构形成鲜明对比。

title: Rippled graphene pores as fluidic memristive devices with synaptic and neuromorphic functionalities
summary: Nanofluidic memristive devices work with nanoscale pores and ions dissolved in water, which harness the ionic memory effect aiming to store and process information. These devices share the same charge carriers as biological systems and bring hope for better emulating the neural functions and developing ionic circuits for neuromorphic applications. Specially, theory and experiments suggest that nanoconfinement is essential for inducing a memory effect, which places limit on the pore size to nm-scale or smaller. Such devices are difficult to scale up with precision and operate with long-term stability. Here, we show that a micrometer size pore, generally expected to exhibit a linear ion transport, can display a pronounced memory effect, if its rim is wrapped by strongly curved and tightly stacked graphene. We attribute the observation to slow ion dynamics confined in the rippled graphene edges. The devices are easy to scale up and integrate into fluidic circuits. The memory effect is ion-selective and exhibits long endurance comparable to the lifetime of synaptic proteins, which enables reversible modification of the conductance states using programmable voltage spikes and various electrolytes over a long time, akin to biological synaptic plasticity. Thanks to this plasticity, our devices and their integrated circuits enable storing, transmitting and processing information with high reliability, fidelity and accuracy, as evidenced in the identification of both greyscale and color images, and in the real-time analysis of emulated neural signals. Our results highlight nanoscale morphology of the pore wall as an important parameter regulating ion transport and indicate that the stringent nanoconfinement for ionic memory can be lifted from restricting the pore size to designing its rim structure. The devices and their integrated circuits may find use in ionic neuromorphic applications.

AI.tldr: 该研究展示了微米级孔隙通过石墨烯边缘结构设计可实现离子记忆效应，突破了传统纳米级限制，为离子神经形态应用提供了新途径。
AI.motivation: 传统纳米流体忆阻器件需要纳米级孔隙才能产生离子记忆效应，这限制了器件的规模化制造和长期稳定性。研究旨在探索是否能在微米级孔隙中实现类似的记忆效应，以克服这些限制。
AI.method: 使用边缘包裹着强弯曲、紧密堆叠石墨烯的微米级孔隙，利用石墨烯边缘的波纹结构限制离子动力学，从而在微米尺度实现记忆效应。
AI.result: 微米级孔隙表现出显著的离子记忆效应，具有离子选择性、长耐久性（与突触蛋白寿命相当），可通过可编程电压脉冲和不同电解质可逆调节电导状态，成功应用于灰度图和彩色图像识别以及实时神经信号分析。
AI.conclusion: 孔隙壁的纳米级形态是调节离子传输的重要参数，离子记忆效应的严格纳米限制可以从限制孔隙尺寸转向设计其边缘结构，为离子神经形态应用提供了可扩展的器件和集成电路。

title: When heat goes astray -- non-local heating in a semiconductor
summary: Heating of semiconductor devices limits their performance and lifetime, which must be addressed by thermal management starting at the heat source. It is a common assumption that the heat source and the resulting heat spot locally coincide, if their size exceeds the mean free paths of the main heat carriers, the phonons. We show that this paradigm of heat locality breaks down on length scales spanning several micrometers. As a consequence, non-local heating occurs in contradiction to Fourier's law. Therefore, we heat laterally structured semiconductor membranes that feature a rising number of interfaces with a well-focussed laser and map-out lattice temperatures by Raman thermometry. Remarkably, the non-local heating can exceed the laser-induced local heating, which we attribute to ballistic phonon transport far above cryogenic temperatures.

AI.tldr: 该研究挑战了热源与热点局部重合的传统假设，揭示了在微米尺度上非局部加热现象的存在，表明傅里叶热传导定律在此尺度上失效。
AI.motivation: 半导体器件发热会限制其性能和使用寿命，传统热管理假设热源与热点在声子平均自由程尺度上局部重合。本研究旨在验证这一假设在微米尺度上的有效性。
AI.method: 使用聚焦激光加热具有横向结构的半导体薄膜（包含多个界面），通过拉曼测温技术绘制晶格温度分布图。
AI.result: 实验发现非局部加热效应显著，其强度甚至超过激光诱导的局部加热，这归因于远高于低温环境的弹道声子输运现象。
AI.conclusion: 热局部性范式在微米尺度上失效，非局部加热现象普遍存在，这对半导体器件的热管理设计提出了新的挑战。

title: Seniority Eigenstate Configuration Interaction
summary: Zero-seniority methods have shown great promise for the description of strongly-correlated electronic systems. Other seniority sectors have been much less explored, and in particular the maximal seniority sector and zero seniority have the same underlying algebraic structure. We introduce a seniority eigenstate configuration interaction in which the wave function is constrained to have good fixed local seniority for each paired orbital, by which we mean we partition orbitals into a pairing set with seniority zero, and a spin set with seniority one. We show how to build the effective Hamiltonian for this ansatz, and demonstrate that high-seniority wave functions have unexpectedly excellent accuracy for strongly-correlated fermionic systems, with accuracy competitive with or better than seniority zero for the Hubbard model and for the dissociation of the nitrogen molecule.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于定域seniority本征态的组态相互作用方法，将轨道分为配对集和自旋集，分别对应seniority 0和1，用于描述强关联电子系统。
AI.motivation: seniority-zero方法在强关联电子系统中表现出色，但其他seniority区域研究较少。最大seniority区域与zero seniority具有相同的代数结构，这启发了对高seniority波函数的研究。
AI.method: 引入seniority本征态组态相互作用方法，将波函数约束为每个配对轨道具有固定的定域seniority。具体将轨道分为配对集（seniority为零）和自旋集（seniority为一），并构建相应的有效哈密顿量。
AI.result: 高seniority波函数在强关联费米子系统中表现出意外的优异精度，对于Hubbard模型和氮分子解离过程，其精度与seniority-zero方法相当或更好。
AI.conclusion: 高seniority波函数是描述强关联电子系统的有效方法，其性能可与seniority-zero方法媲美，为强关联系统研究提供了新的计算策略。

title: Electrically steered conduction topologies and period-doubling phase dynamics in VO2
summary: The insulator-to-metal transition (IMT) in strongly correlated materials, such as vanadium dioxide (VO2), offers a transformative platform for next-generation adaptive electronics and neuromorphic computing. However, harnessing this non-equilibrium phase transition for deterministic device operation is fundamentally hindered by the inability to disentangle electric-field effects from Joule heating, owing to a lack of operando techniques capable of resolving phase dynamics at nanoscale spatial and sub-nanosecond temporal scales. Here, using a newly developed electrical-pulse-pump ultrafast transmission electron microscope (E-UTEM), we directly visualize the multi-scale electro-thermo-mechanical dynamics of the IMT in suspended VO2 devices. Our results reveal that electric-field-induced Poole-Frenkel (PF) emission, localized by patterned oxygen vacancies, plays a decisive role in redistributing the internal electric field to trigger a deterministic Mott transition. The extreme non-linearity of this PF effect enables the formation of dynamically reconfigurable connectivity topologies that bypass conventional thermal limits. Furthermore, we observe that the coupling of thermal and elastic energies governs a discrete domain evolution, characterized by step-wise and period-doubling configurational resets, which is a hallmark of non-equilibrium phase dynamics in constrained geometries. By integrating experimental imaging with phase-field simulations, we establish a comprehensive framework for the electrically-driven IMT and predict sub-100-ps switching kinetics. These findings provide a fundamental basis for the rational design of ultrafast, low-energy functional devices through nanoscale defect and strain engineering in correlated systems.

AI.tldr: 研究者开发了E-UTEM技术，直接观测VO₂绝缘体-金属相变的多尺度电-热-力学动力学，发现电场诱导的Poole-Frenkel发射通过氧空位调控触发确定性Mott相变，揭示了非平衡相变动力学机制。
AI.motivation: 强关联材料如VO₂的绝缘体-金属相变(IMT)为下一代自适应电子和神经形态计算提供了平台，但传统方法无法区分电场效应和焦耳加热，缺乏在纳米空间和亚纳秒时间尺度解析相变动力学的原位技术。
AI.method: 开发了电脉冲泵浦超快透射电子显微镜(E-UTEM)，直接可视化悬浮VO₂器件中IMT的多尺度电-热-力学动力学。结合实验成像和相场模拟，建立了电驱动IMT的综合框架。
AI.result: 发现电场诱导的Poole-Frenkel发射通过图案化氧空位局域化，重新分布内部电场触发确定性Mott相变；观察到热能和弹性能耦合控制离散畴演化，呈现阶梯状和周期加倍构型重置特征；预测了亚100皮秒的开关动力学。
AI.conclusion: 研究为通过纳米尺度缺陷和应变工程在强关联系统中合理设计超快、低能耗功能器件提供了理论基础，揭示了非平衡相变动力学机制，突破了传统热限制。

title: Emergence of rigid Polycrystals from atomistic Systems with general Interactions
summary:
We investigate the formation of polycrystalline structures in a class of particle systems. The atomistic energy is modeled as a sum of particle energies that favor atoms being locally isometric to a reference lattice. The discrete frame invariant energy allows for particle configurations in which no underlying lattice is assumed a priori.
  We prove a discrete-to-continuum limit for configurations with finite surface-energy scaling by means of $Γ$-convergence. The resulting continuum theory is described by piecewise constant fields encoding the local orientation of the configuration. The limiting energy is concentrated on grain boundaries, corresponding to the interfaces between regions where the microscopic configuration has constant orientation. The associated energy density depends on the orientations of the two grains as well as on the normal to the interface.
  Due to our assumptions on the rigid interactions, solid-solid phase transitions with interpolating boundary layers are not energetically favorable; the energy density therefore decomposes into twice the energy density for solid-vacuum transitions.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究粒子系统中多晶结构的形成，通过Γ-收敛证明了离散到连续的极限，得到以晶界能量为主的连续理论。
AI.motivation: 研究粒子系统中多晶结构的形成机制，建立从原子尺度到连续尺度的理论框架，理解晶界能量与微观结构取向的关系。
AI.method: 使用Γ-收敛方法分析具有有限表面能标度的粒子系统，将离散的原子能量模型转化为连续理论，描述为分段常数场表示局部取向。
AI.result: 证明了离散到连续的极限存在，得到的连续理论能量集中在晶界上，能量密度取决于两个晶粒的取向和界面法向，且由于刚性相互作用假设，固-固相变不占优势。
AI.conclusion: 建立了多晶结构形成的连续理论框架，揭示了晶界能量的数学描述，为理解粒子系统中多晶形成机制提供了理论基础。

title: Re-examination of electronic structure of dilute Kondo transition-metal ions substituted into a Heavy Fermion compound
summary: Correlations between the localized and conductive spins/charges have been the central issue of various fascinating quantum phenomena found on itinerant electron systems. Here, the obvious multiplet structures are presented on the Mn 2$p$ to 3$d$ x-ray absorption for a heavy fermion $α$-(Yb,Lu)(Al$_{1-x}$Mn$_x$)B$_4$, indicating that the unoccupied electronic structure of the Mn site is described as the correlated high-spin 2+, even though magnetic measurements show the Mn sites to be nonmagnetic. This apparently paradoxical result demonstrates that a ligand field can effectively appear between localized Mn 3$d$ and surrounding B 2$p$ orbitals, which has been anticipated as a manifestation of a Kondo effect but not been clearly confirmed for most itinerant metals in spectroscopy. By contrast, the Mn 2$p$ photoemission indicates that the occupied Mn$^{2+}$ 3$d$ electrons still exhibit itinerant and nonlocally screened nature also owing to the Kondo-like correlation with the conductive B 2$p$, and heavier Yb 4$f$ and 5$d$ bands below the Fermi energy. The asymmetry on the particle-hole stimulates a reconsideration of the correlation and screening effects in the core-level spectroscopies.

AI.tldr: 在重费米子材料α-(Yb,Lu)(Al₁₋ₓMnₓ)B₄中，Mn位点表现出看似矛盾的电子态：X射线吸收谱显示高自旋Mn²⁺的局域多峰结构，但磁测量却显示Mn位点是非磁性的。这种粒子-空穴不对称性揭示了局域-巡游电子关联的新机制。
AI.motivation: 研究局域化自旋/电荷与导电自旋/电荷之间的关联是理解巡游电子系统中各种量子现象的核心问题。本文旨在通过核心能级光谱学探索重费米子材料中Mn位点的电子态，揭示看似矛盾的实验结果背后的物理机制。
AI.method: 使用X射线吸收谱（Mn 2p→3d）和光电子能谱（Mn 2p）研究α-(Yb,Lu)(Al₁₋ₓMnₓ)B₄材料中Mn位点的未占据和已占据电子结构。结合磁性测量结果，分析局域Mn 3d轨道与周围B 2p轨道之间的配体场效应。
AI.result: Mn 2p→3d X射线吸收谱显示明显的多重峰结构，表明未占据电子态具有高自旋Mn²⁺的局域特征。然而磁性测量显示Mn位点是非磁性的。Mn 2p光电子能谱表明已占据的Mn²⁺ 3d电子仍表现出巡游性和非局域屏蔽特性，这源于与导电B 2p轨道以及Yb 4f和5d能带的近藤型关联。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果揭示了粒子-空穴不对称性：未占据态表现为局域高自旋Mn²⁺，而已占据态则表现出巡游特性。这种不对称性源于Mn 3d与B 2p轨道之间的配体场效应以及近藤型关联，挑战了传统核心能级光谱学中对关联和屏蔽效应的理解，需要重新考虑巡游金属中的电子关联机制。

title: True random number generation through stochastic magnonic bistability
summary: True random number generators (TRNGs) underpin modern cryptography, yet existing implementations face fundamental trade-offs between speed, scalability, and entropy quality. Here, we demonstrate that stochastic switching in the bistable regime of spin-wave dynamics provides a physical entropy source for high-quality random number generation. Our magnonic random number generator (mRNG), based on a lithography-patterned microstrip on yttrium iron garnet (YIG), exploits thermal fluctuations near the nonlinear bistable regime to generate random bitstreams that pass all 15 NIST SP 800-22 statistical tests at rates with 20 Mb/s. We implement a random-bit multiplier using synchronized mRNG units and demonstrate scalability to 200-nm-wide nanoscale waveguides, establishing spin-wave bistability as a viable physical entropy source for integrated random number generation.

AI.tldr: 基于自旋波双稳态的磁子随机数发生器，利用热涨落产生高质量随机比特流，速率达20 Mb/s，通过所有NIST测试
AI.motivation: 现有真随机数发生器在速度、可扩展性和熵质量之间存在基本权衡，需要寻找新的物理熵源来克服这些限制
AI.method: 利用钇铁石榴石微带中自旋波动力学的双稳态区域，通过热涨落产生随机开关，构建磁子随机数发生器
AI.result: 生成速率20 Mb/s的随机比特流，通过所有15项NIST SP 800-22统计测试，可扩展至200纳米宽纳米波导
AI.conclusion: 自旋波双稳态是集成随机数生成的可行物理熵源，具有高质量、高速率和良好可扩展性

title: Quantum transport in gapped graphene under strain and laser--electrostatic barriers
comment: 12 pages, 10 figures. To appear in Physica B (2026)
summary: Electron transport in graphene under a laser-modulated barrier is studied in the presence of an energy gap, a scalar potential, and a uniaxial zigzag strain. The transfer-matrix approach is used with the boundary conditions to derive the transmission probabilities as functions of different system parameters. Without strain, raising either the energy gap or the potential generally reduces transmission in the central and lower sidebands. Moderate zigzag strain generates pronounced Fano-type oscillations that vanish at large strain, while transmission increases for low potential and decreases for high values. In the upper sideband, the incidence energy shifts the resonance peaks to the right, and growing the barrier width generates characteristic oscillatory patterns. Furthermore, increasing the laser field amplitude enhances transmission, whereas higher laser frequencies tend to suppress it. These findings offer new perspectives on controlling electronic transport in gapped graphene via external fields, strain, and potential applications in optoelectronic devices.

AI.tldr: 研究激光调制势垒下石墨烯的电子输运，考虑能隙、标量势和单轴锯齿形应变的影响，发现应变可产生法诺振荡，激光参数可调控透射率。
AI.motivation: 探索在能隙、标量势和单轴应变共同作用下，激光调制势垒如何影响石墨烯的电子输运特性，为光电器件应用提供新思路。
AI.method: 采用转移矩阵方法结合边界条件，推导透射概率随系统参数变化的函数关系，分析不同条件下的电子输运行为。
AI.result: 无应变时，增大能隙或势垒会降低中低边带的透射；中等锯齿形应变产生显著的法诺振荡；激光振幅增强透射，频率升高抑制透射。
AI.conclusion: 通过外部场、应变和势垒的协同调控，可实现石墨烯电子输运的有效控制，为光电器件设计提供新途径。

title: Triple-${\bf Q}$ collinear state with compensated ferrimagnetic nature on frustrated kagome lattice
comment: 10 pages, 4 figures, accepted for publication in npj Spintronics
summary: Spin-selective band splitting without net magnetization and spin-orbit couplings serves for a next-generation spin-current generator, and its typical platforms are altermagnets and compensated ferrimagnets as well, where the existence of a crystal asymmetry or nonequivalent sites is essential. Here, we theoretically demonstrate that such a splitting can be realized in a triple-{\bf Q} 12-sublattice state emerging in a $J_3$-dominant kagome antiferromagnet, without the help of the crystal asymmetry. Reflecting the multi-sublattice nature, a local magnetization reveals a fully compensated ferrimagnetic pattern in units of a triangle plaquette, leading to $s$-wave-type spin splittings in magnon and electron bands. This enables an atiferromagnetic spin Seebeck effect at zero field in insulating systems and filling-controlled polarized states in metallic systems, highlighting the potential of frustrated magnets to realize novel spintronics functionalities.

AI.tldr: 在J3主导的Kagome反铁磁体中，通过三重Q 12子晶格态实现无净磁化的自旋选择性能带分裂，无需晶体不对称性
AI.motivation: 寻找无需净磁化和自旋轨道耦合的自旋选择性能带分裂新机制，探索受挫磁体在自旋电子学中的潜力
AI.method: 理论研究了J3主导的Kagome反铁磁体中的三重Q 12子晶格态，分析其局部磁化模式和能带结构
AI.result: 实现了三角形晶格单元内的完全补偿铁磁模式，在磁子和电子能带中产生s波型自旋分裂
AI.conclusion: 受挫磁体能够实现新型自旋电子学功能，包括绝缘系统中的零场反铁磁自旋塞贝克效应和金属系统中的填充控制极化态

title: Multimodal Transformer for Sample-Aware Prediction of Metal-Organic Framework Properties
summary: Metal-organic frameworks (MOFs) are a major target of machine-learning-based property prediction, yet most models assume that a single framework representation maps to a single property value. This assumption becomes problematic for experimental MOFs, where samples reported as the same framework can exhibit different properties because of differences in crystallinity, phase purity, defects, and other sample-dependent factors. Here we introduce Experimental X-ray Diffraction Integrated Transformer (EXIT), a multimodal transformer for sample-aware prediction of MOF properties that combines MOFid with X-ray diffraction (XRD). In EXIT, MOFid encodes MOF identity, whereas XRD provides complementary information about the experimentally realized sample state. EXIT is pre-trained on one million hypothetical MOFs with simulated XRD to learn transferable representations, leading to improved downstream performance relative to existing approaches. EXIT is fine-tuned on literature-derived experimental datasets for surface area and pore volume prediction. Incorporating experimental XRD improves predictive performance relative to models without experimental XRD, and attention analysis and sample-level case studies further show that EXIT assigns different predictions to samples sharing the same MOF identity when their XRD patterns differ. These results establish a practical step from framework-aware to sample-aware MOF property prediction and highlight the value of incorporating experimental characterization into porous materials informatics.

AI.tldr: EXIT是一个多模态Transformer模型，结合MOFid和XRD数据，用于样本感知的MOF性能预测，解决了传统方法假设单一框架对应单一性能值的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习模型假设单一MOF框架对应单一性能值，但实验中的MOF样品由于结晶度、相纯度、缺陷等差异，即使同一框架也可能表现出不同性能。需要开发能够考虑实验样品状态的预测模型。
AI.method: 提出EXIT多模态Transformer模型，结合MOFid（编码MOF身份）和XRD（提供实验样品状态信息）。先在100万个假设MOF上使用模拟XRD进行预训练学习可迁移表示，然后在实验数据集上微调用于比表面积和孔体积预测。
AI.result: 相比不含实验XRD的模型，EXIT显著提高了预测性能。注意力分析和样本级案例研究表明，当相同MOF身份的样品XRD图谱不同时，EXIT会分配不同的预测结果。
AI.conclusion: EXIT实现了从框架感知到样本感知的MOF性能预测，展示了将实验表征数据纳入多孔材料信息学的重要价值，为更准确的MOF性能预测提供了实用方法。

title: Perspective: Quantum Computing on Magnetic Racetrack
summary: Magnetic domain walls have long been pursued as carriers of classical information for storage and processing. With the ability to create, control, and probe domain walls at the nanoscale, they are recently recognized as an ideal platform for studying macroscopic quantum effects and provide a natural blueprint for building scalable quantum computing architectures. In particular, the experimentally demonstrated high mobility of domain walls makes them not only suitable as stationary qubits but also as flying qubits, which may offer advantages over currently explored quantum computing platforms. In this Perspective, we outline our current understanding of the essential ingredients and key requirements for realizing universal quantum computation based on magnetic domain walls. We highlight promising concrete material platforms and identify the experiments that are still needed to advance this concept. We also discuss the potential challenges and point to new opportunities in this emerging research direction at the interface between magnetism and quantum information science.

AI.tldr: 磁畴壁可作为量子计算平台，兼具静态和飞行量子比特特性，具有高迁移率优势，为实现通用量子计算提供新方向。
AI.motivation: 磁畴壁在经典信息存储和处理中已有应用，近年来被发现可作为研究宏观量子效应的理想平台，并有望构建可扩展的量子计算架构。其高迁移率特性使其不仅适合作为静态量子比特，还可作为飞行量子比特，可能优于现有量子计算平台。
AI.method: 这是一篇Perspective文章，通过分析当前对磁畴壁量子计算基本要素和关键要求的理解，提出具体材料平台建议，并指出需要进行的实验验证。
AI.result: 文章概述了基于磁畴壁实现通用量子计算的基本框架，确定了有前景的具体材料平台，并指出了推进这一概念所需的关键实验验证。
AI.conclusion: 磁畴壁为量子计算提供了有前景的新平台，兼具静态和飞行量子比特优势。虽然面临挑战，但这一磁性-量子信息科学交叉领域的研究方向具有重要机遇，需要进一步实验验证来推进概念实现。

title: Spin-orbit-induced quantum chiral phases
summary: The scalar spin chirality (SSC), whose nonzero value $\langle {\bf S}_i \cdot ({\bf S}_j \times {\bf S}_k) \rangle \neq 0$ implies the breaking of time-reversal and certain point-group symmetries in the ground state, is a key quantity characterizing chiral magnetism in both classical and quantum settings. The classical SSC is manifested, for instance, in skyrmion crystal phase, while the quantum SSC is still highly sought after in various frustrated spin-1/2 models. An interesting possibility that has not been explored so far is the case in which SSC is symmetry-wise allowed, yet remains zero classically due to the collinear or coplanar arrangement of spins, but is generated by virtue of quantum fluctuation. We demonstrate the existence of precisely such a phase in a spin-1/2 triangular-lattice model with XXZ interaction, spin-orbit-induced exchange interactions, and an external magnetic field. Using iDMRG, we thoroughly map out the phase diagram of the model and identify several phases with coexisting magnetic order and SSC. The nonzero SSC arises despite the classical magnetic order being collinear or coplanar. We provide detailed magnon analysis to ascribe its origin to quantum fluctuations around classical magnetic order. The estimate of SSC from magnon analysis agrees with iDMRG results quantitatively. We map out the magnon spectrum and its Berry curvature, culminating in the prediction of finite thermal Hall conductivity in these phases with SSC.

AI.tldr: 在三角晶格自旋1/2模型中，通过量子涨落实现了经典磁序（共线或共面）下仍具有非零标量自旋手征性的新相
AI.motivation: 探索一种新可能性：在对称性允许但经典磁序为零的情况下，通过量子涨落产生标量自旋手征性。这种量子手征性在经典磁序为共线或共面时仍能存在
AI.method: 使用无限密度矩阵重整化群(iDMRG)方法，研究具有XXZ相互作用、自旋轨道耦合诱导交换相互作用和外磁场的三角晶格自旋1/2模型，绘制相图并识别具有共存磁序和手征性的相
AI.result: 发现了多个磁序与标量自旋手征性共存的相，其中非零手征性出现在经典磁序为共线或共面的情况下。通过磁子分析解释了量子涨落的起源，预测了这些相中的有限热霍尔电导率
AI.conclusion: 首次展示了在经典磁序为零的情况下，通过量子涨落产生标量自旋手征性的新机制，为量子手征磁性研究开辟了新方向，并预测了可观测的热霍尔效应

title: Operando Characterization of Volume Changes in Lithium-Ion Battery Electrodes during Cycling using Isotope Multilayers
summary: This study reports on advancements in operando characterization of volume changes in lithium-ion battery (LIB) electrode materials during electrochemical cycling. Volume changes are crucial for LIB operation because they are related to the amount of stored energy as well as LIB integrity, performance, and safety. The study introduces a method based on isotope multilayers as active material to track the intrinsic modification of electrode volume in real time under operating conditions with operando neutron reflectometry. A natGe-73Ge multilayer film is used as a model system to measure the volume change of amorphous germanium electrodes during charging and discharging. Isotope modulation produces a Bragg peak in the neutron reflectivity pattern, sensitive only to the modification of volume within the active material of the electrode. Battery side reactions, such as the growth and reduction of the solid-electrolyte interphase is excluded. Using this method, the volume modification as a function of Li content x in LixGe can easily be derived from the scattering vector position of the Bragg peak without fitting numerous complex reflectivity patterns. The experiments show a reversible volume change of amorphous germanium of up to 250 percent for x = 3, which appears to be largely independent of current density, cycle number, and the thickness of the individual Ge layers. Also, there are tentative indications that the crystallization and re-amorphization of LixGe are not influencing the volume change.

AI.tldr: 开发了一种基于同位素多层膜的operando中子反射法，用于实时监测锂离子电池电极材料在电化学循环中的本征体积变化，排除了副反应干扰。
AI.motivation: 锂离子电池电极材料的体积变化直接影响电池的储能能力、结构完整性、性能和安全，需要准确测量其本征体积变化以排除副反应干扰。
AI.method: 使用natGe-73Ge同位素多层膜作为模型系统，通过operando中子反射法实时监测电极体积变化。同位素调制产生布拉格峰，仅对活性材料内部体积变化敏感，排除了固体电解质界面生长等副反应影响。
AI.result: 实验显示非晶锗电极在x=3时可达250%的可逆体积变化，且该变化基本不受电流密度、循环次数和Ge层厚度影响。初步迹象表明LixGe的结晶和再非晶化过程不影响体积变化。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提供了一种准确测量电极材料本征体积变化的新途径，有助于深入理解锂离子电池的工作机制和性能优化。

title: Intra- and Interlayer Excitonic Fine Structure of the Two-Dimensional Perovskite (PEA)$_2$PbI$_4$
comment: 10 pages, 5 figures. Submitted to Nano Letters
summary: Two-dimensional halide perovskites host strongly bound excitons whose fine structure controls polarization selection rules and radiative recombination, yet several spectral features in (PEA)$_2$PbI$_4$ remain controversially assigned. Here, polarization-resolved low-temperature photoluminescence combined with first-principles G$_0$W$_0$+BSE calculations resolves both the intralayer and interlayer excitonic fine structure of this prototypical n=1 Ruddlesden-Popper perovskite. The low-energy multiplet is consistently described as a purely excitonic intralayer fine structure governed by crystal symmetry, octahedral distortions, and the two-layer unit cell, without invoking Rashba or exciton-polaron mechanisms as the primary origin. A weaker doublet ~45 meV above the bright intralayer states is identified as interlayer excitons from its agreement with the calculated interlayer manifold in energy and splitting. Although the static calculations underestimate their oscillator strength and do not reproduce the observed orthogonal polarizations, distortion-induced mixing with bright intralayer excitons strongly enhances interlayer optical activity and provides a plausible explanation for their visibility. Our results establish interlayer excitons in (PEA)$_2$PbI$_4$ and refine the excitonic description of fine structure in two-dimensional perovskites.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过偏振分辨低温光致发光实验和第一性原理计算，揭示了(PEA)₂PbI₄中激子的精细结构，确认了层内激子精细结构并首次识别出层间激子。
AI.motivation: 二维卤化物钙钛矿中的激子精细结构控制着偏振选择规则和辐射复合，但(PEA)₂PbI₄中的多个光谱特征存在争议性归属，需要澄清其激子精细结构的本质。
AI.method: 结合偏振分辨低温光致发光实验和第一性原理G₀W₀+BSE计算，系统研究了n=1 Ruddlesden-Popper钙钛矿(PEA)₂PbI₄的激子精细结构。
AI.result: 低能多重态被确认为由晶体对称性、八面体畸变和双层晶胞决定的纯激子层内精细结构，而非Rashba或激子-极化子机制。在亮层内态上方约45 meV处发现了一个较弱的双重态，被识别为层间激子。
AI.conclusion: 该研究确立了(PEA)₂PbI₄中层间激子的存在，并通过畸变诱导的与亮层内激子的混合解释了其光学活性，完善了二维钙钛矿中激子精细结构的描述。

title: Four-layer charge density waves and chirality in CsV$_3$Sb$_5$
summary: The kagome superconductor CsV$_3$Sb$_5$ is the only one in the AV$_3$Sb$_5$ family (A=K,Rb,Cs) that shows a $2\times2\times4$ charge-density-wave (CDW) ground state competing with the more common $2\times2\times2$. In addition, it is also the only one that shows second-harmonic transport and thus broken inversion symmetry, suggesting these two features are connected. In this work, we test whether the $2\times2\times4$ CDW can break inversion symmetry by analyzing its stacking energetics with a real-space Ginzburg-Landau free energy. In the limit where each layer is forced to adopt a fixed, threefold symmetric tri-hexagonal configuration, we find an analytical phase diagram mostly occupied by inversion preserving AB and ABCD stacked solutions. Relaxing this rigid layer constraint in a physically meaningful way consistent with \emph{ab initio}--calculated parameters, we find several new phases including an AABC solution and a distorted ABCD solution, which break inversion and all mirrors and are thus chiral. However, these phases occupy only small fractions of phase space, suggesting other mechanisms for inversion symmetry breaking may be at play in CsV$_3$Sb$_5$.

AI.tldr: 研究通过Ginzburg-Landau自由能分析CsV₃Sb₅中2×2×4 CDW是否破坏反演对称性，发现虽然存在手性相，但仅占相空间小部分，暗示可能有其他机制导致反演对称性破缺。
AI.motivation: CsV₃Sb₅是AV₃Sb₅家族中唯一显示2×2×4 CDW基态和二次谐波输运（反演对称性破缺）的材料，研究旨在验证这两种特征是否通过2×2×4 CDW的堆叠方式相关联。
AI.method: 使用实空间Ginzburg-Landau自由能分析2×2×4 CDW的堆叠能量学，首先在每层固定为三重对称三六角形构型的极限下分析，然后放宽刚性层约束，考虑与第一性原理计算参数一致的物理方式。
AI.result: 在刚性层约束下，相图主要由保持反演对称性的AB和ABCD堆叠解占据；放宽约束后发现了新的相，包括AABC解和扭曲的ABCD解，这些相破坏反演对称性和所有镜面对称，具有手性，但仅占据相空间的小部分。
AI.conclusion: 虽然2×2×4 CDW堆叠可以产生破坏反演对称性的手性相，但这些相在相空间中占比很小，表明CsV₃Sb₅中可能存在其他导致反演对称性破缺的机制。

title: Lattice thermal transport from phonon spectra beyond perturbation theory
summary: We develop a molecular dynamics framework to compute the mode-resolved phonon spectral density from classical correlations of an annihilation-like phonon variable. For harmonic oscillators, classical molecular dynamics exactly reproduces the corresponding quantum Kubo-transformed correlator, providing the basis for extension to anharmonic systems. Using PbTe as a benchmark and Cs$_3$Bi$_2$I$_6$Cl$_3$ as a strongly anharmonic test case, we show that the method captures both quasiparticle and non-Lorentzian spectra beyond perturbative quasiparticle theory, while yielding thermal conductivity in good agreement with experiment. This framework provides a direct route from classical molecular dynamics to quantum-mechanical Wigner heat transport in solids.

AI.tldr: 开发了一种从经典分子动力学计算模式分辨声子谱密度的框架，基于湮灭类声子变量的经典关联函数，能够准确描述谐波系统并扩展到非谐系统。
AI.motivation: 需要一种能够直接从经典分子动力学计算量子力学维格纳热输运的方法，特别是在强非谐系统中超越微扰准粒子理论，准确描述声子谱密度。
AI.method: 开发了基于湮灭类声子变量经典关联函数的分子动力学框架，对谐波振子能精确重现量子久保变换关联函数，然后将该方法扩展到非谐系统。
AI.result: 以PbTe为基准，Cs$_3$Bi$_2$I$_6$Cl$_3$为强非谐测试案例，该方法能同时捕捉准粒子和非洛伦兹谱，热导率计算结果与实验吻合良好。
AI.conclusion: 该框架提供了从经典分子动力学到量子力学维格纳热输运的直接途径，为固体中热输运研究提供了有效工具。

title: Electronic structure and oxidation states in high-pressure synthesized isostructural CeCN$_5$ and TbCN$_5$
summary: Understanding the behavior of 4$f$ electrons in materials containing rare earth elements is one of the fundamental questions within condensed matter physics. In this work the electronic properties of isostructural CeCN$_5$ and TbCN$_5$, both recently synthesized at extreme pressure, are investigated using Density Functional Theory (DFT) calculations. We include the on-site Coulomb repulsion between localized 4$f$ states within the static DFT+U framework; the DFT+U results are cross-checked with DFT+dynamical mean-field theory (DMFT) calculations within the quasi-atomic (Hubbard-I) approximation. Despite CeCN$_5$ and TbCN$_5$ being isostructural compounds Ce and Tb show different oxidation states, 4+ and 3+ respectively. This leads to distinctly different electronic properties: the former compound is an insulator, while the latter is a metal. An extra electron which is donated by Ce to the polymeric C-N network is distributed across the network. This leads to a modification of the bond length in CeCN$_5$ compared to TbCN$_5$. Still, the polymeric C-N networks can accommodate the different oxidation states in isostructural lanthanide-carbon-nitrogen (LnCN) compounds. Our results underline that LnCN compounds under high pressure offer a unique platform for probing the interplay between 4$f$-electron behavior and structural complexity.

AI.tldr: 通过DFT+U和DFT+DMFT计算研究高压合成的CeCN₅和TbCN₅的电子性质，发现尽管同构但Ce为4+价态（绝缘体），Tb为3+价态（金属），揭示了4f电子行为与结构复杂性的相互作用
AI.motivation: 理解稀土元素中4f电子的行为是凝聚态物理的基本问题，研究高压合成的同构CeCN₅和TbCN₅化合物，探索4f电子性质与结构的关系
AI.method: 采用密度泛函理论（DFT）计算，包含静态DFT+U框架处理局域4f态间的库仑排斥，并用DFT+动态平均场理论（DMFT）在准原子（Hubbard-I）近似下进行交叉验证
AI.result: CeCN₅和TbCN₅虽然同构但氧化态不同（Ce为4+，Tb为3+），导致前者为绝缘体，后者为金属；Ce向聚合C-N网络贡献的额外电子分布在网络中，导致键长变化
AI.conclusion: 高压下的LnCN化合物为研究4f电子行为与结构复杂性的相互作用提供了独特平台，聚合C-N网络能够适应同构镧系化合物中不同的氧化态

title: Field-induced antiferromagnetic transition in CeIrIn$_5$
comment: Accepted for publication as a Letter in Phys. Rev B
summary: We report low-temperature $^{115}$In nuclear magnetic resonance (NMR) study of the prototypical heavy-fermion compound CeIrIn$_5$ in high magnetic fields applied close to the crystallographic $c$ axis. For this orientation, a field-induced transition was previously reported to take place at about 28 T. Although we do not observe any change of the NMR spectrum above the transition, the intensity of the NMR lines drastically decreases as a consequence of a considerable shortening of the $T_2$ relaxation time. In addition, $1/T_1$ shows a pronounced maximum at the transition. Taking into account previous high-field de Haas-van Alphen results in conjunction with band-structure calculations, our NMR results are most naturally explained by the field-induced transition into an antiferromagnetic state with the propagation vector $\mathbf{Q} = (1/2, 1/2, 0)$ and magnetic moments aligned antiferromagnetically along the $c$ axis. This makes CeIrIn$_5$ a unique case where the application of the magnetic field induces an ordered state with moments antiferromagnetically aligned along the field direction.

AI.tldr: 在CeIrIn₅重费米子化合物中，高磁场(~28 T)沿c轴方向诱导出反铁磁态，磁矩沿磁场方向反铁磁排列，这是罕见的磁场诱导反铁磁序现象。
AI.motivation: 研究CeIrIn₅重费米子化合物在强磁场下的行为，特别是之前报道的28 T磁场诱导相变，探索其微观磁有序性质。
AI.method: 使用低温¹¹⁵In核磁共振(NMR)技术，在接近晶体c轴方向施加高磁场，测量NMR谱线、T₂弛豫时间和1/T₁弛豫率。
AI.result: NMR谱线强度显著降低（T₂弛豫时间缩短），1/T₁在相变处出现明显峰值。结合之前的de Haas-van Alphen测量和能带结构计算，表明磁场诱导了传播矢量Q=(1/2,1/2,0)、磁矩沿c轴反铁磁排列的反铁磁态。
AI.conclusion: CeIrIn₅是磁场诱导磁矩沿磁场方向反铁磁排列有序态的独特案例，为理解重费米子系统中磁场诱导相变提供了重要见解。

title: Atomic-scale origin of charge density wave-driven metal-semiconductor transition in an incommensurately modulated metal-organic framework
summary: The intrinsic incommensurate charge density wave in metal-organic frameworks has remained elusive due to the lack of direct evidence linking atomic-scale structural modulation to macroscopic electronic properties. Using high-quality Pr3HHTP2 (HHTP = 2,3,6,7,10,11-hexahydroxytriphenylene) single crystals as a model system, we precisely resolve, for the first time, the incommensurately modulated structure of a conductive metal-organic framework at 100 K (modulation vector q = 0.39143(12) c*) via temperature-dependent single-crystal X-ray diffraction. The subsequent observation of a reversible metal-semiconductor transition around 350 K, which perfectly synchronizes with the disappearance of the structural modulation, provides convincing evidence for the electronic origin of the lattice distortion. Guest water molecules stabilize the modulated phase by synergistically regulating the relative rotation of the linkers and the interlayer spacing, thereby optimizing the inter-linker interactions. This work establishes a concrete experimental criterion for one-dimensional charge density wave in metal-organic frameworks and provides an ideal platform for probing coupled electronic-lattice modulations.

AI.tldr: 首次在导电金属有机框架中精确解析了非公度电荷密度波结构，发现350K附近可逆金属-半导体转变与结构调制消失同步，证实了晶格畸变的电子起源
AI.motivation: 金属有机框架中的非公度电荷密度波一直难以捉摸，缺乏将原子尺度结构调制与宏观电子性质直接关联的实验证据
AI.method: 使用高质量Pr3HHTP2单晶作为模型系统，通过变温单晶X射线衍射在100K下精确解析非公度调制结构（调制矢量q = 0.39143(12) c*）
AI.result: 观察到350K附近可逆金属-半导体转变，该转变与结构调制消失完美同步；客体水分子通过协同调控连接体相对旋转和层间距来稳定调制相
AI.conclusion: 为金属有机框架中一维电荷密度波建立了具体实验标准，为探测耦合电子-晶格调制提供了理想平台

title: Photonic Chirality for Braiding and Readout of Non-Abelian Anyons
summary: We propose a cavity-based scheme that uses photonic chirality to control braiding and read out non-Abelian anyons in a fractional quantum Hall platform. Counter-propagating cavity modes interfere with a classical reference tone to create a rotating pinning landscape whose direction is set by photon circulation, so that opposite photonic branches drive opposite anyon loops. This realizes a branch-conditioned braid operation and maps the resulting braid response onto cavity intermode coherence. We derive the rotating pinning term and the readout relation at the effective-theory level, identify an operating window set by subgap driving, adiabatic transport, localization, and cavity coherence, and provide phenomenological diagnostics of transport locking. In the minimal four-anyon Ising realization, the leading signal reduces to a calibrated phase; more generally, the same readout structure becomes state dependent when the relative braid operator is non-scalar. The scheme provides a cavity route to braid-sensitive readout of non-Abelian anyons without relying on fragile electronic interference fringes.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于光学腔的方案，利用光子手性控制分数量子霍尔平台中非阿贝尔任意子的编织和读出，通过腔模干涉创建旋转钉扎势场，实现分支条件编织操作并将编织响应映射到腔模间相干性上。
AI.motivation: 现有非阿贝尔任意子探测方法通常依赖于脆弱的电子干涉条纹，需要发展更稳健的读出方案。本文旨在利用光学腔的相干性和光子手性特性，实现不依赖电子干涉的编织敏感读出。
AI.method: 采用反向传播的腔模与经典参考音干涉，创建方向由光子环流决定的旋转钉扎势场。不同光子分支驱动相反的任意子环路，实现分支条件编织操作。通过有效理论推导旋转钉扎项和读出关系，确定由亚能隙驱动、绝热输运、局域化和腔相干性设定的工作窗口。
AI.result: 在最小的四任意子Ising实现中，主要信号简化为校准相位；更一般地，当相对编织算子非标量时，相同的读出结构变为状态依赖。该方案提供了对非阿贝尔任意子编织敏感的腔读出途径，无需依赖脆弱的电子干涉条纹。
AI.conclusion: 该腔基方案利用光子手性控制非阿贝尔任意子的编织和读出，通过旋转钉扎势场和腔模间相干性映射编织响应，为稳健的非阿贝尔任意子探测提供了新途径，避免了传统电子干涉方法的脆弱性。

title: Hydrodynamics of the viscous electron fluid in cadmium
summary: Thanks to electron-electron ($e$-$e$) collisions conserving momentum, metallic electron fluids are viscous. Yet, this viscosity is rarely detectable in bulk transport. Here, we report on the canonical realization of the Gurzhi effect in an elemental three-dimensional metal: cadmium. Using focused ion beam microstructuring to tune the effective thickness, we detected a low-temperature size-dependent resistivity upturn in a finite window sandwiched between ballistic and diffusive regimes. Within this window, the electrical conductivity displays a simultaneous quadratic dependence on both sample size and temperature -- fingerprint of a hydrodynamic flow. This leads us to quantify the amplitude and the temperature dependence of kinematic and dynamic viscosity of the electron fluid. In cadmium, in contrast with graphene and $^3$He, the rate of momentum-conserving $e$-$e$ collisions is not set by the main Fermi energy, but by Lilliputian energy scales and inter-valley bottlenecks.

AI.tldr: 在三维金属镉中首次观测到Gurzhi效应，通过微结构调控样品厚度，在弹道与扩散传输之间的有限窗口内检测到低温尺寸依赖电阻率上升，证实了电子流体动力学流动的存在。
AI.motivation: 金属电子流体具有粘度，但由于电子-电子碰撞守恒动量，这种粘度在体输运中很少被检测到。研究旨在在三维金属中实现Gurzhi效应，验证电子流体动力学行为。
AI.method: 使用聚焦离子束微结构技术调控镉样品的有效厚度，测量低温下尺寸依赖的电阻率变化，分析电导率对样品尺寸和温度的双重二次依赖关系。
AI.result: 在弹道与扩散传输之间的有限窗口内观测到低温尺寸依赖电阻率上升，电导率同时显示对样品尺寸和温度的二次依赖，这是流体动力学流动的特征指纹。成功量化了电子流体的运动粘度和动态粘度。
AI.conclusion: 首次在三维金属镉中实现Gurzhi效应，证实了电子流体动力学流动。与石墨烯和³He不同，镉中动量守恒的电子-电子碰撞速率不由主费米能级决定，而是由微小能级尺度和谷间瓶颈控制。

title: Intrinsic i-wave altermagnetism in 2D graphene superlattices
summary: Altermagnets feature unconventional magnetism due to their momentum-dependent spin splitting purely driven by magnetic order, for which a variety of transition-metal-based d-wave altermagnets have been proposed. However, carbon-based altermagnets in graphene structures remain elusive, even though magnetism in graphene nanostructures has been widely demonstrated. Here, we establish a symmetry-guided design principle to engineer i-wave altermagnets in graphene antidot superlattices and demonstrate the emergence of altermagnetic states in specific monolayer and bilayer graphene superlattices. By combining first principles methods and atomistic tight binding models, we show the appearance of an interaction-induced i-wave altermagnetic splitting, stemming from the intrinsic magnetic instability of 2D graphene antidot superlattices. Our work establishes a strategy to engineer i-wave altermagnetism in a graphene platform, putting forward a carbon-based platform for altermagnetic spintronics.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种在石墨烯反点超晶格中设计i波反铁磁体的对称性指导方法，实现了碳基反铁磁平台。
AI.motivation: 虽然过渡金属基的d波反铁磁体已被广泛研究，但石墨烯结构中的碳基反铁磁体仍然难以实现，尽管石墨烯纳米结构中的磁性已被广泛证实。研究人员希望建立一种在石墨烯平台中设计反铁磁体的方法。
AI.method: 采用对称性指导的设计原则，结合第一性原理方法和原子紧束缚模型，研究单层和双层石墨烯反点超晶格中的反铁磁态。
AI.result: 在特定的单层和双层石墨烯超晶格中观察到了i波反铁磁分裂，这种分裂源于二维石墨烯反点超晶格的固有磁不稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了在石墨烯平台中设计i波反铁磁体的策略，为反铁磁自旋电子学提供了一个碳基平台。

title: Termination-Controlled Fractionalization and Hybridization at Topological Interfaces in Organic Spin Chains
summary: A single organic spin platform hosts both dimerized $S=\tfrac{1}{2}$ and effective Haldane $S=1$ sectors, linked by bond-texture inversion. At the junction, the fractional mode is controlled by termination parity: quenched by local fusion at one termination and released as an uncompensated spin-$\tfrac{1}{2}$-like degree of freedom at the parity-shifted one. Two such internal boundary modes of a finite embedded Haldane domain hybridize with an exponentially decaying splitting, establishing termination parity as a design principle for engineering and coupling fractional boundary modes.

AI.tldr: 有机自旋平台同时包含二聚化S=1/2和有效Haldane S=1区域，通过键纹理反转连接。在连接处，分数模式受终止宇称控制：在一端被局部融合淬灭，在宇称移动端作为未补偿的自旋1/2自由度释放。
AI.motivation: 研究有机自旋平台中不同自旋区域之间的连接机制，探索分数边界模式的控制原理，为工程化设计和耦合分数边界模式提供理论基础。
AI.method: 利用键纹理反转连接二聚化S=1/2和有效Haldane S=1区域，分析终止宇称对分数模式的控制作用，研究有限嵌入Haldane域中两个内部边界模式的杂交行为。
AI.result: 分数模式在连接处的行为由终止宇称决定：在一端被局部融合淬灭，在另一端作为未补偿的自旋1/2自由度释放。两个内部边界模式以指数衰减的分裂进行杂交。
AI.conclusion: 终止宇称是工程化和耦合分数边界模式的设计原则，为控制有机自旋平台中的分数激发提供了重要机制。

title: Landauer-based study of transport in Chern insulator heterostructures
comment: Accepted for publication in Physical Review B
summary: We study charge transport through a trivial-topological-trivial junction described by the continuous Qi-Wu-Zhang model, which realizes a two-dimensional Chern-insulating phase. The central region is tuned into the topological regime, while the adjoining leads remain trivial, and an electrostatic barrier of tunable height and width is applied exclusively to the topological slab. By matching wave functions across the interfaces, we obtain the angle- and energy-resolved transmission probability and demonstrate the occurrence of Klein tunneling despite the presence of a bulk spectral gap. Within the continuum Dirac description, this perfect transmission originates from the inversion of the Dirac mass across the junction, which reflects the band inversion of the central layer relative to the trivial leads. In the Qi-Wu-Zhang model considered here, this mass inversion coincides with the transition between trivial and Chern-insulating phases and is accompanied by finite Berry curvature that governs the nonlinear transport response. The resulting transmission function is then incorporated into a Landauer-Büttiker framework to analyze both linear and nonlinear transport. Closed-form expressions for the linear and nonlinear conductances are derived at zero and finite temperatures. In addition, we investigate the role of dephasing, showing how partial loss of coherence suppresses Fabry-Pérot oscillations while leaving the overall transport trends intact. Finally, we map out the interplay between barrier height, slab thickness, and topological mass parameter, identifying optimal regimes that yield enhanced rectification in the nonlinear response.

AI.tldr: 研究拓扑-平庸-拓扑结中的电荷输运，发现存在克莱因隧穿现象，完美透射源于狄拉克质量反转，与拓扑相变相关，并分析了线性和非线性输运响应。
AI.motivation: 研究拓扑绝缘体与平庸绝缘体界面处的电荷输运特性，特别是克莱因隧穿现象在存在体谱隙情况下的出现，以及拓扑相变对输运行为的影响。
AI.method: 采用连续Qi-Wu-Zhang模型描述二维Chern绝缘体相，通过匹配界面波函数获得角度和能量分辨的透射概率，结合Landauer-Büttiker框架分析线性和非线性输运，并考虑退相干效应。
AI.result: 发现尽管存在体谱隙，仍出现克莱因隧穿现象，完美透射源于狄拉克质量反转（对应拓扑相变）。推导了零温和有限温下线性和非线性电导的解析表达式，退相干抑制法布里-珀罗振荡但不改变整体输运趋势，确定了非线性响应中增强整流的最佳参数区间。
AI.conclusion: 拓扑-平庸界面处的狄拉克质量反转导致克莱因隧穿，与拓扑相变密切相关。非线性输运响应受贝里曲率调控，通过优化势垒高度、厚度和拓扑质量参数可增强整流效应，为拓扑器件设计提供理论指导。

title: Supermoiré domain-resolved effective Hamiltonians and valley topology in helical multilayer graphene
summary: Extending moiré graphene beyond twisted bilayers, helical trilayer graphene has shown topological bands and correlated states with reshaped moiré periodicity. Here we develop a theoretical framework for helical multilayer graphene to investigate its supermoiré relaxation and low-energy electronic structure. Using real-space lattice calculations, we find that relaxation reconstructs the system into locally periodic single-moiré domains, which provide the basis for a continuum description. Within each reconstructed domain, downfolding the first-shell model yields effective Hamiltonians near the Dirac points that reveal how the low-energy spectrum decomposes into folded Dirac sectors. We further evaluate the valley Chern numbers encoded in these effective Hamiltonians, obtaining domain-dependent and gate-tunable topological responses consistent with the lattice calculations. Our results establish a domain-resolved organizing principle for thicker helical graphene stacks, in which folded Dirac sectors partition the low-energy spectrum, while local stacking families determine the corresponding band character and topological response.

AI.tldr: 提出螺旋多层石墨烯的理论框架，研究超莫尔松驰和低能电子结构，发现松驰重构形成局部周期性单莫尔畴，建立畴分辨的组织原则。
AI.motivation: 螺旋三层石墨烯已显示出拓扑能带和具有重塑莫尔周期性的关联态，需要将螺旋石墨烯扩展到多层系统，研究其超莫尔松驰和低能电子结构。
AI.method: 使用实空间晶格计算研究螺旋多层石墨烯的松驰重构，发现系统重构为局部周期性单莫尔畴，基于此建立连续描述，通过第一壳模型降维获得狄拉克点附近的有效哈密顿量。
AI.result: 松驰重构形成局部周期性单莫尔畴，低能谱分解为折叠狄拉克扇区，有效哈密顿量揭示谷陈数具有畴依赖性和栅极可调性，与晶格计算一致。
AI.conclusion: 建立了更厚螺旋石墨烯堆叠的畴分辨组织原则：折叠狄拉克扇区划分低能谱，而局部堆叠家族决定相应的能带特性和拓扑响应。
